title: Post-Combo5 SigLIP14 + Weak22 P005 Gain
module_detail: The no-anchor reviewer found two residual local island repairs after the combo5 best. M8 composes only non-overlapping one-tracklet moves; M12 validates density_simple plus p005_area delivery.
used_in_pipeline: yes: root ./demo.sh defaults to this DS1 method reproduction after this package is promoted
summary: After the scheduler combo5 best, the reviewer tested six compatible remaining local-gated candidates. SigLIP rank14 seq5486 and weakmetric rank22 seq7771 were both direct-positive; their two-tracklet combo improves canonical p005_area IDF1 from 0.669311 to 0.669466.
implementation: No anchors and no GT identities are used for proposer/reviewer evidence. The method rebuilds the prior combo5 assignment from committed no-anchor feature manifests, composes SigLIP rank14 and weakmetric rank22 with kit/compose_no_anchor_cross_manifest_repairs.py, exports a fresh submission zip, and scores direct, density_simple, and p005_area. GT is used only by the evaluator after materialization.
environment: Python with numpy pandas pyarrow scikit-learn reid-hota and Pillow
No plaintext API keys in commands, logs, scripts, repo, or S3; future GPT-image experiments must read OPENAI_API_KEY from env only

workflow_steps.action: call the previous reproduce.sh to rebuild combo5 from feature evidence and scheduler manifests
workflow_steps.output: combo5 assignment plus weakmetric/SigLIP local-gated manifests

workflow_steps.input: combo5 assignment + remaining compatible local-gated candidates
workflow_steps.output: SigLIP rank14 and weakmetric rank22 are positive; ties/negatives recorded

workflow_steps.input: fresh submission zip from composed assignment
workflow_steps.action: run density_simple then valid p005_area with config/drop checks

per_video_table.note: changed by new local island repair
changed by new local island repair

visual_cases.title: SigLIP rank14 seq5486
visual_cases.summary: A one-tracklet MCAM04/Tc6 island moves from component 14 / gid 96000015 to component 47 / gid 96000051.
visual_cases.failure_reason: The old graph kept seq5486 inside a large source component even though the target component was the best local SigLIP explanation.
visual_cases.improvement: Move only seq5486 and promote only after direct+density+p005 validation.

visual_cases.title: Weakmetric rank22 seq7771
visual_cases.summary: A one-tracklet MCAM08/Tc6 island moves from component 6 / gid 96000007 to component 82 / gid 960000202.
visual_cases.failure_reason: Standalone gain was small, so this candidate was not trusted as a standalone identity decision.
visual_cases.improvement: Use it as an interaction repair paired with SigLIP rank14; keep only because canonical p005 improves.

visual_cases.title: Context: combo5 SigLIP rank18 seq2344/2390/2549
visual_cases.summary: Previous combo5 repaired a three-tracklet component-51 island into component 29.
visual_cases.failure_reason: The earlier graph kept a small false-split island.
visual_cases.improvement: This gain continues the same local-island strategy after combo5.

visual_cases.title: Context: combo5 SigLIP rank06 seq7200
visual_cases.summary: Previous combo5 moved seq7200 from component 18 to component 0.
visual_cases.failure_reason: A residual island needed a local move, not a broad component merge.
visual_cases.improvement: The current gain applies the same constrained repair rule to two new islands.

visual_cases.title: Context: combo5 weak rank12 seq582
visual_cases.summary: Previous combo5 moved seq582 from component 2 to component 43.
visual_cases.failure_reason: Weakmetric evidence alone is not enough; it needed full-score validation.
visual_cases.improvement: Weak rank22 follows that same reviewer-gated path.

ablations.name: combo_sig14_weak22_direct
ablations.change: compose seq5486 and seq7771 after combo5
